title: Survival Challenges
description:
一个生存挑战数据包
A survival challenges datapack
body:
一个支持多人游玩的生存挑战数据包
玩家选择加入游玩队伍或者留在旁观队伍，在规则书第三页点击数字可开始游戏
（每一项的配置都由点击数字更改）
若想要所有人都可以修改生存挑战设定，需要全员op或者使用诸如luckperms等模组开放function指令的使用权限
A survival challenges datapack that supports multiplayers
Each player can choose to join or leave the ingame party, press the number in page 3 of the rule book to start the game
(To switch between enabled and disabled for the rules, you should press the number behind the rules)
If you want to make everybody able to change the rules, you should op everybody or give everybody the permission of using /function by luckperms etc.
